entities.name: AGRI-FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems encompassing the production, processing, and distribution of food and agricultural products

entities.name: COMPLEXITY
entities.description: A characteristic of agri-food systems involving unpredictability and multi-scale dynamics that can hamper development projects

entities.name: UNPREDICTABILITY
entities.description: A source of complexity in agri-food systems that makes project outcomes uncertain

entities.name: PATH DEPENDENCIES
entities.description: A source of complexity where historical decisions constrain current and future options

entities.name: CONTEXT-SPECIFIC DYNAMICS
entities.description: A source of complexity arising from the unique characteristics of local environments and societies

entities.name: POWER RELATIONS
entities.description: A source of complexity involving the distribution of power and influence among stakeholders

entities.name: TEMPORAL AND SPATIAL SCALES
entities.description: A source of complexity involving the interaction of different timeframes and geographic areas

entities.name: AGRI-FOOD SYSTEM PRINCIPLES
entities.description: A set of six proposed guidelines to help project designers navigate complexity and uncertainty

entities.name: COMPARATIVE CASE STUDY ANALYSIS
entities.description: A research method used to analyze six CGIAR projects to test agri-food system principles

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop used in a project focused on aflatoxin control in Malawi

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in a project implemented in Eastern and Southern Africa

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop used in projects for beer production in Kenya and biofuel production in India

entities.name: BEANS
entities.description: A legume crop used in a project for precooked products in Uganda and Kenya

entities.name: AFLATOXIN
entities.description: A toxic contaminant found in groundnuts that the project aimed to control

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITION SECURITY
entities.description: A primary objective of international development projects in agri-food systems

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS' INCOMES
entities.description: A primary objective of international development projects in agri-food systems

entities.name: BIOFUEL
entities.description: An energy product derived from sweet sorghum in a project in India

entities.name: SMART FOODS
entities.description: A project aimed at improving nutrition in India and Eastern Africa

entities.name: GLOBAL SOUTH
entities.description: The geographic region where the discussed agri-food system challenges and projects are located

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The location of the groundnut aflatoxin control project

entities.name: EASTERN AND SOUTHERN AFRICA
entities.description: The location of the pigeonpea and Smart Foods projects

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The location of the sorghum beer and precooked beans projects

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The location of the sweet sorghum biofuel and Smart Foods projects

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: The location of the precooked beans project
